message:
chore: Add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Ignore common temporary and local-only files:
- ._* (macOS AppleDouble metadata files)
- .beads/.br_history/ (beads CLI local history)
- .beads/.bv.lock (beads viewer lock file)
- *.bak (backup files)
- *.incomplete (incomplete/in-progress files)
- Snipping_*.png (Windows Snipping Tool screenshots)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -20,6 +20,7 @@ vscode/package-lock.json
 # OS
 .DS_Store
 Thumbs.db
+._*
 
 # Go
 vendor/
@@ -36,3 +37,14 @@ internal/cli/outputs/
 .bv/
 *.out
 .ntm/
+
+# beads local state
+.beads/.br_history/
+.beads/.bv.lock
+
+# Temporary/backup files
+*.bak
+*.incomplete
+
+# Screenshots
+Snipping_*.png
